mnemonics: My Mother Knows Everything Reveals Noise Easily
Noise Reduction is Fun with Fast Transform
keyPoints: Frequency Domain Filtering (FDF): Image processing technique
Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) or Discrete Fourier Transform (DFT): Used for FDF
Low Pass Filter (LPF) or High Pass Filter (HPF): Types of filters used in FDF
Wiener Filter: Commonly used filter in FDF for noise reduction
Periodic Noise: Types of noise that can be reduced using FDF
Restoration Process: Image degradation and FDF-based restoration
